inputs.label: Material Type
inputs.businessContext: Material type affects cutting speed and power requirements. Based on laser cutting industry standards (e.g., Trumpf, Bystronic).

inputs.label: Material Thickness
inputs.businessContext: Thickness directly impacts cutting speed and time. Typical range for laser cutting: 0.5-25 mm.

inputs.label: Total Cutting Length
inputs.businessContext: Total length of cuts per part or batch. Determines primary cutting time.

inputs.label: Cutting Speed
inputs.businessContext: Speed depends on material and thickness. Typical values from machine manufacturer tables.

inputs.label: Piercing Time per Pierce
inputs.businessContext: Time to pierce the material at start of each cut. Varies with material and thickness.

inputs.label: Number of Pierces
inputs.businessContext: Number of pierces per part or batch. Typically equals number of cut contours.

inputs.label: Rapid Traverse Distance
inputs.businessContext: Distance the laser head moves without cutting (positioning).

inputs.label: Rapid Traverse Speed
inputs.businessContext: Maximum positioning speed of the laser head. Typical: 60-120 m/min.

inputs.label: Setup Time
inputs.businessContext: Time for loading material, programming, and machine preparation.

inputs.label: Batch Size
inputs.businessContext: Number of identical parts in the batch. Affects setup amortization.

inputs.label: Labor Cost per Hour
inputs.businessContext: Operator labor cost including overhead. Typical range: $20-$80/h.

inputs.label: Machine Cost per Hour
inputs.businessContext: Machine depreciation, maintenance, energy, and consumables. Typical: $30-$200/h.

inputs.label: Data Confidence
inputs.businessContext: User's confidence in input data accuracy. Affects output adjustment for risk.

thresholds.cuttingSpeed: If cuttingSpeed < 0.5, warning: 'Very slow cutting speed, check material/thickness compatibility.'
thresholds.piercingTimePerPierce: If piercingTimePerPierce > 5, warning: 'High piercing time, consider pre-drilling or different gas.'
thresholds.setupTime: If setupTime > 30, warning: 'Long setup time, consider SMED techniques.'
thresholds.batchSize: If batchSize < 10, warning: 'Small batch, setup time dominates.'

hiddenLossDrivers: If cuttingSpeed < 0.5: 'Very slow cutting speed, check material/thickness compatibility.'
If piercingTimePerPierce > 5: 'High piercing time, consider pre-drilling or different gas.'
If setupTime > 30: 'Long setup time, consider SMED techniques.'
If batchSize < 10: 'Small batch, setup time dominates.'
suggestedActions: Optimize cutting speed based on material and thickness tables.
Reduce piercing time by using advanced piercing cycles or different assist gas.
Minimize rapid traverse distance by optimizing nesting layout.
Apply SMED to reduce setup time.
Increase batch size if possible to amortize setup time.
